rationale: Statistically overrepresented in LLM output; sounds performative rather than genuine. Human writers almost never start a sentence with 'delve into'.
AI cliché used to gesture at complexity; almost always hollow decoration rather than meaningful description.
Corporate buzzword that LLMs import from business-speak; 'use' is almost always clearer and more direct.
Filler hedge that delays the actual information; common AI padding phrase signalling something important without actually saying it.
Hyperbolic adjective used by LLMs to add apparent importance; rarely justified and quickly fatigues the reader.
Metaphor overused in AI-written surveys ('the AI landscape', 'the competitive landscape'); loses all imagery through repetition.
Tech-speak adjective that LLMs apply to almost everything; vague enough to mean nothing while sounding technical.
Urgency adjective that AI models insert reflexively to inflate importance; desensitises the reader when every step is 'crucial'.
Management-speak verb that LLMs favour for abstract nouns ('foster collaboration', 'foster growth'); 'build' or 'encourage' is usually more direct.
Quasi-poetic noun that AI models use to dress up mundane domains ('the realm of AI'); 'area' or 'field' is almost always cleaner.
Formal transition word that LLMs string between paragraphs to fake logical flow; human prose rarely needs 'moreover' to connect ideas.
Stiff connective overused by AI to signal continuation; reads as filler scaffolding rather than a genuine logical link.
Sentence-opening transition that LLMs reach for by default; 'also' or simply restructuring the sentence is lighter and more natural.
Marketing adjective AI attaches to every integration and workflow; hollow promise that rarely describes anything concrete.
Adverbial twin of 'seamless'; AI uses it to assert effortless operation without showing how, padding the sentence with empty reassurance.
Quasi-academic verb ('underscores the importance of') that LLMs favour to sound analytical; 'shows' or 'highlights' is plainer and clearer.
Importance-inflating adjective in the same family as 'crucial' and 'vital'; AI applies it indiscriminately until it carries no weight.
Cliché in the construction 'a testament to'; AI uses it as a stock way to claim significance instead of demonstrating it.
Ornamental adjective AI uses to dress up 'complex'; signals sophistication without adding information.
Literary quantifier overused in LLM prose ('a myriad of options'); 'many' is plainer and avoids the faux-elevated register.
Showy synonym for 'a lot of' that AI reaches for to sound erudite; almost always reads as padding.
Grandiose verb ('embark on a journey') that LLMs use to inflate ordinary beginnings; 'start' or 'begin' is direct and unpretentious.
Marketing verb AI applies to experiences, brands and workflows ('elevate your game'); vague uplift-speak in place of concrete improvement.
Promotional metaphor ('unlock the potential') that AI uses to imply hidden value; 'enable' or 'allow' states the same thing without the hype.
Power-fantasy verb ('harness the power of') heavily favoured by LLMs; 'use' or 'apply' carries the meaning without the dramatics.
Brochure verb ('the device boasts a 4K display') that AI imports from product copy; 'has' or 'includes' is neutral and honest.
Promotional verb LLMs use instead of plain 'show' or 'demonstrate'; adds a marketing sheen without changing the meaning.
Bureaucratic verb AI prefers over 'help' or 'make easier'; lengthens the sentence and distances the reader for no gain.
Needlessly formal swap for 'use' that LLMs default to; adds syllables and stiffness without adding meaning.
Catch-all completeness adjective ('a comprehensive guide') AI attaches to almost any noun; usually an unearned claim of thoroughness.
Stale novelty cliché ('cutting-edge technology') that LLMs reach for to signal modernity; the phrase has been drained of meaning by overuse.
Hype cliché AI uses to assert impact; almost always overstates the case and triggers reader scepticism rather than interest.
Decorative adjective ('a vibrant community', 'a vibrant ecosystem') AI sprinkles for colour; conveys mood without conveying fact.
Stock modifier ('the ever-evolving landscape') that LLMs pair with abstract nouns; a tired way to say something simply changes over time.
Throat-clearing opener AI uses to establish relevance; says nothing and can almost always be cut to a single word or removed entirely.
Stock hedging preamble that signals importance without delivering it; pads the sentence and delays the actual point.
Filler framing phrase AI uses to introduce a topic; 'for', 'with', or rephrasing removes the wind-up and gets to the subject.

pattern: at the end of the day
rationale: Conversational cliché LLMs use as a faux-conclusive flourish; adds length and a tired register without adding substance.
Grandiose framing ('in the realm of machine learning') AI uses to dress up a plain domain reference; 'in' carries the same meaning.
Hollow significance template ('X plays a vital role in Y') that AI repeats reflexively; replace with a concrete statement of what X actually does.
